---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

<!-- The user-facing problem you're trying to solve. What's currently
     painful or impossible? -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- Concrete shape: new CLI command? new MCP tool? new workflow type?
     new agent? Be specific about the interface. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other shapes that might solve the same problem, and why you
     didn't pick them. -->

## Scope check

<!-- This project is a Claude Code workflow engine + vault + MCP
     server. Things that fit:
     - new workflow primitives (gate types, agent permissions, …)
     - new MCP tools surfacing vault data
     - new CLI commands for vault/task/workflow operations
     - new agent types or built-in workflows

     Things that don't fit:
     - generic CLI utilities unrelated to Claude Code
     - language-specific tooling (lint rules, formatters)
     - features that duplicate Claude Code core functionality

     Where does this fit? -->

## Willing to PR?

<!-- yes / no / maybe — if yes, link to CONTRIBUTING.md and the
     maintainer can scope-confirm before you start. -->
